playbook.intent: Every fortnight to one quotable result captured (case study or 1-2 sentence testimonial) with permission, in reusable format.
playbook.scope: Founder captures one quotable result per fortnight from a happy client. Output: short case study or 1-2 sentence testimonial, with permission, in reusable format. Exit artifact: testimonial + permission + one media asset (logo or quote card).

success-criteria.criterion: Quote tied to a measurable outcome
Reusable asset (logo / quote card / 30-sec video) saved

stage.name: Pick the win
stage.intent: Pick the most measurable, repeatable win from the last 2 weeks.

tasks.task: Scan QBR / status notes for outcomes
Pick one with the cleanest metric
Tag it to a content pillar

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the win has a number tied to it.

stage.name: Ask + capture
stage.decision-gate: Advance only with written permission on file.

stage.name: Package + log
stage.intent: Make it reusable across landing, deck, social.

tasks.task: Generate a quote card / logo block

stage.decision-gate: Required: asset saved in library + tagged to pillar.

extra.value: [Long-form case-study production - separate motion, Paid endorsements / affiliate quotes - distinct workflow]
[Active book of clients with measurable outcomes, Testimonial microsurvey template]
[Capturing fluffy quotes ('great team!') - useless on landing pages, Skipping the permission step - re-work later, Storing assets in Slack - lost within a month]
['Does the quote include a number?', 'Is permission in writing?', 'Is the asset findable in 3 clicks from the library?']

{human: faion get-content bi-weekly-case-study-testimonial-capture --format md, agent: faion get-content bi-weekly-case-study-testimonial-capture --format context, json: faion get-content bi-weekly-case-study-testimonial-capture --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
